label: Hyperscaler AI builders (demand Superorg proxy)
note: Not a single equity. Aggregates hyperscaler organisations whose capex and talent vectors reinforce the AI compute phase transition (Aschenbrenner industrial mobilisation).

exceptional_leadership.evidence: Lab-adjacent and cloud leadership with multi-year AI product and infra commitment; public capex guides in valuation ai_overlay.

scale_beyond_individual.evidence: Trillion-scale compute and power plans require corporate aggregation.

multi_domain_specialisation.evidence: Chips, models, cloud, power procurement, product — concurrent specialised teams.

efficient_coordination.evidence: Internal alignment varies by firm; treat as partial at the aggregate level.

tools_network_freeride.evidence: Platform network effects and developer ecosystems; recursive use of AI to build AI.

stance_implication: Demand reinforcement for power/land/hosting sleeve (TPL/APLD/LB). Context only — never writes base IRR.
